div.h1: ABA Problem in Lock-Free Free Lists

div.p: head points to A. Free list is healthy.
T1 reads head (A) and A.next (B). Context Switch occurs now.

ol.li: T2 pushes A back. head is A again, but list is changed.

div.p: T1 resumes. head is A? Yes. T1 sets head to B. CRITICAL FAILURE.

ul.li: Next caller gets a dirty pointer.
Physical pointer A was reused while B was removed.

ol.li: Hazard Pointers: T1 marks A as "In-Use" so T2 cannot re-add it to the list yet.
Tagged Pointers: Store (Pointer, Version). CAS checks both. (A, 1) != (A, 2).
